sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107405" key="u(perdisu/llabos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερδῐσύλλᾰβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107405.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of more than two syllables,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.227</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
